creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Henry Hu <henry.hu.sh@gmail.com> -----

Subject: Re: ports/132352: [patch] databases/mysql-query-browser hangs when 
	picking scheme
From: Henry Hu <henry.hu.sh@gmail.com>
To: linimon@freebsd.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org

No, I'm not referring to databases/mysql-query-browser, but
databases/mysql-gui-tools, and this patch is for the
mysql-query-browser installed by it. Please review it. Thanks.

----- End forwarded message -----
